# ai.jurepi.kr LLMs.txt

Welcome to ai.jurepi.kr - Free AI Tools Hub

## Tools

### Hairstyle Recommendation (헤어스타일 추천)
- **Korean**: https://ai.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/hairstyle-recommendation
  Discover hairstyles that suit your face shape with AI analysis.
- **English**: https://ai.jurepi.kr/en/tools/hairstyle-recommendation
  Get AI-recommended hairstyles tailored to your face shape.

## Privacy & Data

All tools on ai.jurepi.kr are designed with privacy-first principles:
- No user data is stored without explicit consent
- For tools requiring image analysis (like Hairstyle Recommendation), images are analyzed once and immediately deleted
- Never logged or persisted to any storage

## Access Instructions

1. Visit the tool page (Korean or English)
2. Follow the in-app instructions
3. Results are generated locally with no data retention

For more information, visit https://ai.jurepi.kr/
